commands.title: M (MUMPS): Open all M files in workspace as tabs
M (MUMPS): Smoke-report all M files in workspace

m-cli.args.description: Extra arguments passed to `m lsp` (the subcommand is added automatically). Example: ["--verbose"].

m-cli.enabled.description: Enable the m-cli Language Server. Provides live lint diagnostics, format-on-save, and Quick Fix code actions for .m files.

m-cli.path.description: Path to the `m` CLI binary. Defaults to looking for `m` on PATH. Set this to an absolute path if m-cli is installed in a virtualenv (e.g. /home/you/projects/m-cli/.venv/bin/m).

m-cli.trace.server.description: Log LSP messages between the editor and the m-cli server (visible in the Output panel under "m-cli LSP").
